scripts.deploy:prod: bash -lc 'if [ "${DEPLOY_ENV}" != "prod" ]; then echo "Skipping deploy: DEPLOY_ENV is not prod"; exit 1; fi; if [ "$(hostname)" != "pi" ]; then echo "Skipping deploy: not running on pi"; exit 1; fi; npm run build:prod && sudo mkdir -p /var/www/static/assistant-widget && sudo rm -rf /var/www/static/assistant-widget/* && sudo cp -R dist/* /var/www/static/assistant-widget/ && echo "Deployed widget files:" && find /var/www/static/assistant-widget -maxdepth 3 -type f | sort && echo "Verification:" && grep -R "Опишете накратко какво планирате\|introItems\|launcherLabel" -n /var/www/static/assistant-widget || true'
